mapper.select: SELECT id, doctor_id, schedule_date, time_slot, schedule_type FROM schedule

SELECT s.id AS schedule_id, s.doctor_id, DATE_FORMAT(s.schedule_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS schedule_date, s.time_slot, s.schedule_type, d.name AS doctor_name, d.title AS doctor_title, d.phone AS doctor_phone, dep.name AS department_name, dep.id AS department_id FROM schedule s JOIN doctor d ON s.doctor_id = d.id JOIN department dep ON d.department_id = dep.id WHERE s.schedule_type = 'OUTPATIENT' AND s.schedule_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY s.schedule_date, s.time_slot
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (doctor_id, schedule_date, time_slot, schedule_type) VALUES (#{doctorId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{scheduleType})
